title: EmbeddiumUI
description: Adds embeddium options for a lot of mods
body:
Add Embeddium options for a lot of mods.

Supported Mods:
- [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)
- [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)
- [Entity Sound Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/esf)
- [Cull Leaves](https://modrinth.com/mod/cull-leaves)
- [Ryoamic Lights](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/ryoamiclights)
- [Dynamic FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps)

![Options page NeoForge 1.21](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f140769e47c6cce695038c803b7cc72646c0ea6c.jpeg)
